infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nexvy uses your camera to scan barcodes and analyse meal photos for nutrition tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nexvy accesses your photo library to analyse meal photos for nutrition tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Nexvy tracks your location in the background to map your runs and walks.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Nexvy uses your location to track your outdoor activities.
infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Nexvy reads your HealthKit data to sync workouts and activity rings.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Nexvy writes workout data to HealthKit for your health records.
infoPlist.NSUserTrackingUsageDescription: Nexvy uses this identifier to improve your experience.
